infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Abhaya uses your location to plan safe journeys and detect route deviations.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Abhaya uses the camera to scan suspicious vehicles and record emergency evidence.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Abhaya uses your photo library so you can upload vehicle images and save them as evidence.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Abhaya uses the microphone to record emergency evidence with audio.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Abhaya uses your location to plan safe journeys and detect route deviations.
